title: K-200 Comms/Datalink Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Comms/Datalink Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-454-F. Revision: F. Type: manual. Author: Lena Okafor. Created: 2024-09-08. Last modified: 2025-04-16. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Comms/Datalink subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1129.
